title: SMOTE: Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique
notes: Original SMOTE; reports F-measure and ROC convex hull on 9 imbalanced UCI sets. No fidelity diagnostic.

title: Borderline-SMOTE: A New Over-Sampling Method in Imbalanced Data Sets Learning
ADASYN: Adaptive Synthetic Sampling Approach for Imbalanced Learning
Modeling Tabular Data using Conditional GAN (CTGAN & TVAE)
per_class_fidelity_measured: partial (likelihood/coverage on full table — not per-class)
notes: Introduces CTGAN and TVAE; fidelity reported on full mixed-class data.

title: Using Generative Adversarial Networks for Improving Classification Effectiveness in Credit Card Fraud Detection
training_epochs: ~2000 (paper reports ~2000 training iters; not epochs in standard sense)
notes: Credit-card fraud (Kaggle ULB). Reports F1/sensitivity; no DCR/NNDR.

title: Conditional Wasserstein GAN-based Oversampling of Tabular Data for Imbalanced Learning
training_epochs: epochs not fixed; trained to convergence (~300–500)
notes: cWGAN; benchmarks across 7 imbalanced sets including credit fraud. No per-class fidelity.

title: CTAB-GAN: Effective Table Data Synthesizing
notes: Adds classification & info loss; fidelity via JSD/Wasserstein on aggregated columns.

title: The Use of GANs to Alleviate Class Imbalance in Tabular Data: A Survey
per_class_fidelity_measured: no (notes lack of per-class fidelity as gap)
notes: Survey: confirms most works use random folds and no per-class fidelity diagnostics.

title: TabDDPM: Modelling Tabular Data with Diffusion Models
per_class_fidelity_measured: partial (column-wise statistics; not split by class)
notes: First diffusion model for tabular data; ML-utility dominant metric.

title: FinDiff: Diffusion Models for Financial Tabular Data Generation
notes: Financial tabular focus; evaluates TSTR + privacy but no per-class DCR/NNDR.

title: CTAB-GAN+: Enhancing Tabular Data Synthesis
notes: Extension of CTAB-GAN with WGAN-GP loss; downstream ML utility & privacy.

title: The Synthetic Data Vault (SDV)
notes: Origin of SDV ecosystem (used by CTGAN/TVAE wrappers); fidelity API per column.
